name: Successful Logon After Multiple Failures
notes: Detects a successful login following multiple failed attempts. Indicates possible brute force success. Event ID 4624 after 4625.

responses.offense_naming_expression: Successful Logon After Brute Force: $USERNAME from $SOURCEIP

tests.text: when the event QID is contained in the following list: [4624]
when the preceding event count for QID 4625 is greater than 3 in 10 minutes
